title: Bitcoin Denominations and Satoshis
description: Bitcoin is commonly expressed in BTC and satoshis. One bitcoin contains 100 million satoshis, making the satoshi the smallest standard unit used to quote and transfer bitcoin amounts.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Foundational reference for bitcoin units, amounts, and transaction representation.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Technical context for integer-denominated transaction amounts.
